technology.title: New cell imaging method shines a light on blind spots
technology.desc: Cells are crowded, dynamic places where thousands of molecules interact in tight quarters. Until now, scientists lacked a reliable way to see many of these molecular interactions as they happen. Researchers at the University of Illinois Chicago have now developed a new imaging method that allows scientists to see previously hidden enzyme activities in small regions across the whole cell. The findings, published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, open new possibilities for understanding how cells process information.

technology.desc: Apple Back to School 2026（BTS）開學優惠預計本週正式上線。根據 Bloomberg 記者 Mark Gurman 於 7 月 12 日在 X 平台發帖確認，Apple 零售店已開始佈置 BTS 宣傳物料，並重組陳列專設教育桌展示 Mac 及 iPad 系列，顯示推廣活動即將啟動。今年活動延遲的背景是 Apple 於 6 月 25 日因 DRAM 記憶體短缺而上調全線 Mac 及 iPad 售價，幅度達 6% 至 13%，BTS 贈品優惠因此備受關注。合資格用戶包括香港認可大專院校學生、教職員及家長，購買指定 Mac 可免費獲贈 AirPods 4 / AirPods Pro 3，購買 iPad Pro / iPad Air 可獲贈 Apple Pencil Pro，堪稱一年之中入手 Apple 裝備的最佳時機。

world.title: Default social media curfews, autoplay curbs confirmed for older teens in UK
world.desc: MLex Summary: Social media platforms in the UK will have to impose midnight-to-6am curfews by default for 16- and 17-year-olds, and must automatically disable autoplay and infinite-scroll feeds for these users, the UK government said in a statement on Tuesday. But over-16s should be able to disable the automatic protections, as the government said measures should “strike a balance between giving older teenagers greater safeguards online, while still allowing them to change their own settings if they wish.” Ministers also promised to bring forward a package of measures to help children use AI chatbots safely.
